name: multiple-from-with-sender
description: Message with multiple From addresses requiring Sender header (RFC 5322 section 3.6.2)
input:
From: alice@example.com, bob@example.com
Sender: alice@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Multiple Authors
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <multifrom-123@example.com>

Message with multiple authors.
